mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications ( recipient_id, actor_id, notification_type, target_type, target_id, post_id, help_id, comment_id, answer_id, friend_request_id, title, content, read_flag ) VALUES ( #{recipientId}, #{actorId}, #{notificationType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{postId}, #{helpId}, #{commentId}, #{answerId}, #{friendRequestId}, #{title}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{readFlag}, 0) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET read_flag = 1, read_time = COALESCE(read_time, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_flag = 0
